textPlain: I don't understand why anyone would try to invent a new screensaver when we already have flying toasters.

I like the fun concept! Sadly the seemingly fixed (not sure, correct me) text in the top left corner means this is a less than ideal screensaver for their original purpose, but burn-in is almost not a problem today.
>burn-in is almost not a problem today.Sure, but OLED suffer from burn out and LCD suffer from image persistance when there is static content.
